title: Datadog (DDOG) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Datadog Q4 2023 Earnings Beat Wall Street Estimates. Financial Results: Datadog reported fourth-quarter 2023 non-GAAP earnings per share of 44 cents which increased 109.5 percent from the year-ago quarter and beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 2.33 percent. The company's net revenues of 589.6 million rose 25.6 percent year over year and beat the consensus estimate by 4.05 percent. Key Metrics: The company ended the fourth quarter with 27,300 customers up from 23,200 in the prior-year period. Datadog had 3,190 customers with an annual run rate of 100,000 or more which increased 15 percent year over year. Profitability: Datadog's adjusted gross margin increased 290 basis points on a year-over-year basis to 83.4 percent. Datadog reported non-GAAP operating income of 166.7 million compared with 83.1 million in the year-ago quarter. Product Adoption: As of the end of the fourth quarter 83 percent of customers used two or more products up from 81 percent in the year-ago quarter. Additionally 47 percent of customers utilized four or more products up from 42 percent.
